name: Upper Body Strength
description: Build upper body strength with bodyweight and dumbbells

exercises.name: Push Up
instructions: Start in high plank with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your chest toward the floor
Push back up to starting position explosively
Keep body in a straight line throughout
exercises.formTip: Full range of motion, chest to ground

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height
Press weights overhead until arms fully extend
Lower back to shoulder height with control
Keep core braced throughout the movement
exercises.formTip: Keep elbows at 45 degrees, squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides
Raise arms out to sides until shoulder height
Keep a slight bend in your elbows
Lower back down slowly with control
exercises.formTip: Slight bend in elbows, control the weight

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides
Curl weights up by bending your elbows
Squeeze biceps at the top of the movement
Lower slowly back to the starting position

exercises.name: Dumbbell Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands
Lower the weight behind your head by bending elbows
Extend arms back to the starting position
Keep elbows close to your head throughout
exercises.formTip: Keep elbows close to head, extend fully

exercises.name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Place hands on a bench or chair behind you
Extend legs forward with heels on the ground
Lower body by bending elbows to 90 degrees
Push back up to starting position
exercises.formTip: Control the dip, do not flare elbows wide
